extension_layer.focus: WhatsApp DOM parsing, cache-aware analysis scheduling, non-intrusive overlay injection

ui_component_layer.focus: React component states, progressive disclosure, dark theme overlay

backend_layer.focus: Analyze API, validation, caching, response normalization

ai_agent_layer.focus: Modular reasoning pipeline with extraction, classification, retrieval, countering, scoring

data_layer.focus: Shared contracts, retrieval corpus, hashing, cache helpers
